perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a promotional graphic featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and an animated character from Wreck-It Ralph on a green background. (2) A series of fast-paced cuts follow, showing various products in a warehouse store environment. Items include toilet paper, beef rolls, sanitary pads, shredded squid, pork belly, chips, protein powder, and chewing gum. (3) Each product shot is overlaid with large text boxes displaying the product name, original price, discount amount, and final special price. (4) The sequence continues through dozens of items, including snacks, biscuits, milk, eggs, sausages, coffee, ice cream, and household goods like towels and rugs. (5) The video ends with a final shot of discounted food items.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music with a steady beat starts immediately. (2) A male voiceover begins speaking rapidly in Mandarin, announcing the product names and their discounted prices in sync with the visual cuts. (3) The tone is consistent, high-energy, and informative, maintaining a fast pace throughout the entire video. (4) There is minimal ambient store noise, suggesting the narration was recorded separately or the audio was heavily processed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Costco Weekly Special Report 05/19-05/25 - Remember to follow us (Hook/Decorative). (2) Kleenex Three-layer Bathroom Tissue: Original 419 -84 Special 335 (Functional). (3) U.S. Choice Beef Pastrami Roll: Original 669 -70 Special 599 (Functional). (4) Various product titles and pricing information continue to appear in a standardized format across the screen in bright yellow and pink text (Functional).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid Product Discount List -> Closing

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No humans are visible on screen at any point.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various aisles and refrigerator sections of a Costco warehouse, with products stacked on pallets or displayed on metal shelves.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, uniform industrial lighting typical of a large retail store.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-speed informational bulletin to inform consumers about weekly discounts and special prices at Costco Taiwan for the period of May 19 to May 25. It aims to provide maximum information in a short timeframe to encourage shopping visits.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on promoting the pricing and availability of products within a specific retail chain (Costco).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Rapid-fire narration, consistent graphical overlay style for pricing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This is a typical example of short-form 'price report' content popular on platforms like TikTok or Reels, optimized for quick consumption of retail information.
